latin: Vir mysticus duas pilulas ostendit — unam rubram, alteram caeruleam. 'pilulam caeruleam elige et fabula finita erit. pilulam rubram elige et videbis quam profunda sit caverna.'

questions.prompt: What do the two pills represent?
questions.target: A choice between ignorance and truth
choices: A choice between ignorance and truth

questions.prompt: What happens with the blue pill?

translation: A mysterious man showed two pills — one red, the other blue. 'Choose the blue pill and the story will be finished. Choose the red pill and you will see how deep the rabbit hole goes.'
